meaning: missing in action 战斗中失踪的(人)
examples: Mia realized her trick had rebounded on her.
In this film, Mia, a woman with intellectual impairment from Beirut, Lebanon, talks about the discrimination that she has faced in education.
The title character, played by Mia Farrow, is a pampered Upper East Side lady-who-lunches.
Mia Gordon of Edinburgh Academy and Amelia Purkis, of Lilliesleaf Primary School in Melrose.
